description_long: This object is a compact firearm with a predominantly gray and black body, accented by deep red elements on the grip and trigger. The barrel is elongated and cylindrical, featuring a black suppressor or silencer attachment at the front, which extends its length. The grip is ergonomically shaped and colored red, with a matching red trigger and lower frame section. The slide and upper receiver are gray, with subtle ridges and detailing, while the trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized for finger access. The overall design is modern and streamlined, with no visible external magazine or pump mechanism, and the stock is a pistol grip type with no shoulder stock present.
description: A modern, compact firearm with a gray and black body, red grip and trigger, and a long black suppressor attached to the barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, including the red grip, red trigger, and the black suppressor extending from the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible on the grip or trigger.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the red grip and trigger visible, and the suppressor extending forward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the top of the slide, with the suppressor aligned directly away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long cylindrical suppressor; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
